title: Alaska Women’s Business Center (AWBC) Is Now Open for Business

title: IRS Advises That Improperly Forgiven Paycheck Protection Program Loans Are Taxable
summary: The IRS recently issued guidance addressing improper forgiveness of a Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) loan. The guidance confirms that, when a taxpayer’s loan is forgiven based upon misrepresentations or omissions, the taxpayer is not eligible to exclude the forgiveness from income and must includ...

summary: Join us this Wednesday, at 2 pm, for our next presentation of Laugh and Learn. The post Laugh & Learn – 10/12/2022 first appeared on Chugachmiut .

title: Eighty-nine new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta Oct. 1–7
summary: During the week of October 1–7, YKHC reports 89 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: RurAL CAP names Chief Financial Officer
summary: Rural Alaska Community Action Program, Inc. (RurAL CAP), a statewide nonprofit, named John Stackhouse Chief Financial Officer (CFO).
